name: Braswell&Son Hermitage
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop and luxury goods buyer operating since 1979 across Arkansas and Tennessee. Offers pawning, selling, and authenticated pre-owned luxury items with no credit checks.
description_long:
Braswell & Son is a family-owned pawn shop and luxury goods retailer established in 1979, currently operating 8 locations across Little Rock, Conway, and Nashville. The company has built its reputation on handling high-end collateral and resale inventory, positioning itself as a trusted solution for both borrowers and sellers in the luxury goods market.

The company offers three primary services: pawn loans on luxury items with no credit checks required, same-day cash purchases for items being sold outright, and an authenticated pre-owned luxury retail operation. Their pawn loans typically include an initial period with 30-day extension options, though fees and terms vary by state and store location. They buy and sell gold and silver, fine and estate jewelry, luxury watches, designer handbags, musical instruments, and high-quality electronics.

Braswell & Son distinguishes itself through staff expertise and authentication guarantees. The company employs a graduate gemologist and in-house jeweler who certify fine jewelry pieces. All handbags, watches, and sneakers are authenticated using what they describe as "advanced verification methods" examining details down to stitching. This authentication backing is marketed as their "Braswell Authenticity Guarantee (B.A.G.)" and applies to their retail inventory of pre-owned luxury goods.

As a traditional pawn operation, the service model provides immediate, no-credit-check cash access in exchange for collateral, which is useful for consumers needing emergency funds but comes with the standard pawn industry caveat: items must be redeemed within specified timeframes or forfeit ownership. While the company emphasizes luxury goods specialization and expert authentication, pawn shops inherently involve higher effective costs compared to traditional lending when redemption fees and interest are annualized.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No credit checks required for pawn loans—immediate qualification regardless of credit history
Family-owned business with 45+ years of operating history and community presence
Graduate gemologist and in-house jeweler on staff for professional jewelry certification
Advanced authentication methods for luxury items with written Braswell Authenticity Guarantee backing retail purchases
Multiple service options: pawn loans, outright sales, and authenticated retail shopping in one location
Same-day cash offers and payouts for items being sold
8 physical locations across Arkansas and Tennessee for accessibility
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical possession of items as collateral, creating redemption risk if unable to repay within term
Fees and interest terms vary by state and store with no transparent pricing disclosed on website
Limited geographic availability restricted to Little Rock, Conway, and Nashville areas only
Pawn industry model results in high effective annual rates when fees and interest are annualized over short loan periods
Website does not disclose specific loan terms, APRs, fees, extension costs, or redemption timelines
best_for: Consumers with luxury goods needing emergency short-term cash without credit qualification
Individuals looking to sell or liquidate jewelry, watches, handbags, or instruments for immediate payment
Buyers seeking authenticated pre-owned luxury goods with expert certification and warranty backing
People in the Little Rock, Conway, or Nashville areas with valuable collateral but poor credit history
diagnosis: Braswell & Son is best suited for consumers in Arkansas and Tennessee who own luxury goods and need emergency cash quickly without credit qualification, or who want to sell valuables for same-day payment. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral and come with state-varying fees and terms that can result in high effective costs; transparent APR and fee disclosure is absent from their marketing materials, and items must be redeemed within specified timeframes or ownership is forfeited.
services: Pawn loans on luxury goods with no credit checks
30-day initial pawn terms with extension options
Same-day cash offers for items being sold outright
Gold and silver buying and pawning
Fine and estate jewelry evaluation, buying, and pawning
In-house jewelry certification and expert evaluation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3930 Lebanon Pike suite A, Hermitage, TN 37076
